title: Clustered Feature Importance (CFI, MLfAM Ch6) as headline importance
source: LdP book audit (6 parallel read-only auditors vs AFML + Machine Learning for Asset Managers, books in D:/PROJECTS/QuantTradingDocs), 2026-06-03. Conversation: 'audita el proyecto usando los libros'.
why: Per-feature MDA (feature_importance.py:37) is computed on the raw correlated tier2 matrix with NO PCA orthogonalization and NO clustering. AFML 8.4 and MLfAM 6.5 warn correlated features split/dilute each other importance (two identical features may look unimportant, MLfAM.txt:4121). This directly undermines the documented orthogonal-feature-set-is-the-real-bottleneck conclusion (MEMORY hypothesizer_persona_ceiling): that verdict rests on per-feature MDA that is itself substitution-biased, so an apparently-dead macro feature may be merely a correlated twin whose credit was stolen. B0125 quant-phd-advisor note already names CFI as the right tool over SHAP.
value_rationale: Highest-leverage methodology fix for the decorrelation bottleneck: only AFML/MLfAM-sanctioned way to tell genuinely-no-signal from signal-masked-by-a-correlated-twin before accepting feature-scarcity as final.
scope: Implement MLfAM 6.5.2 clustered MDA (featImpMDA_Clustered): cluster features (ONC or correlation-distance), permute whole clusters, re-attribute importance to clusters
Keep per-feature MDA as a diagnostic; CFI becomes the headline
Score with neg-log-loss (depends on B0130) and the existing avg_uniqueness sample weights
Re-evaluate the orthogonal-feature-scarcity verdict against the cluster-level importances
recommendation: Adopt CFI before treating the orthogonal-feature bottleneck as confirmed.
out_of_scope: SHAP as selector (rejected in B0125 -- inherits substitution bias). Single-feature IC (B0125).

history.reason: LdP book audit: no clustered importance; per-feature MDA substitution-biased

Implemented: Clustered Feature Importance (cluster_features + clustered_mda_importance, MLfAM 6.5.2) wired per-fold (cluster on train, permute clusters on test), persisted to clustered_mda.json in both orchestrators. 15 feature_importance tests green incl. substitution-resolution proof (~37x recapture).
fix: LÃ³pez-de-Prado audit fixes B0129-B0133 (purge, MDA, CFI, DSR, calib)
verification: clustering should be ONC (B0139); add VI distance (B0140) + importance t-value reporting
